## Tags
columns, settings, customize, table, grid, adjust, configuration, panel, layout

## Categories
layout, design

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/columns-3-cog)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Columns3Cog;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Columns3Cog { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
